_comment_purpose: redroid-seccomp.json — seccomp BPF profile pinned for ReDroid 12 L0a baseline + L1 sandbox cells. Allowlist style (defaultAction=SCMP_ACT_ERRNO/EPERM). Owned by the Stability Agent at canonical path agents/stability/stack/seccomp/redroid-seccomp.json. Filed under CLO-61.
_comment_hardening: Hardening posture vs. Docker's default seccomp + the earlier emulator-builder draft: (1) defaultAction is SCMP_ACT_ERRNO not SCMP_ACT_ALLOW; (2) process_vm_readv / process_vm_writev are REMOVED from allow; (3) ptrace is restricted to PTRACE_TRACEME (request==0) via arg filter — PTRACE_ATTACH/PEEK/POKE return EPERM; (4) mount(2) is restricted to MS_BIND-flagged invocations via arg filter on syscall arg-index 3 (mountflags) masked against MS_BIND (0x1000) — non-bind mounts return EPERM; (5) init_module / finit_module / delete_module / create_module / query_module / kexec_load / kexec_file_load / reboot / iopl / ioperm / acct / quotactl / nfsservctl / personality / vhangup / pivot_root / uselib / ustat / sysfs / setdomainname / sethostname remain DENIED by default (not listed in any allow group). This is sufficient for ReDroid 12 + Magisk's /system bind-mount overlay (cpuinfo-overlay's service.sh uses MS_BIND); it is INSUFFICIENT for magiskhide's ptrace tracer-pid scrub on hidden processes (L4 Shamiko is the intended root-hide, not magiskhide). The Stability Agent's healthcheck will record any module-load failure flowing from these restrictions in reports/stability/{run_id}.json::module_failures.
_comment_compliance: refuse-privileged-compose §4 + agents/orchestrator/SPEC.md §4 compliant. NOT a substitute for cap_drop:[ALL], no-new-privileges:true, or image digest pinning.

syscalls._group: filesystem-and-namespace-core (Android boot + Magisk overlay needs; ptrace and mount are intentionally NOT here — see arg-filtered groups below)

magisk-mount-bind-only (CAP_SYS_ADMIN-gated by namespace; flags arg MUST mask against MS_BIND=0x1000=4096 — non-bind mount calls return EPERM). cpuinfo-overlay's service.sh issues `mount --bind /data/adb/modules/cpuinfo-overlay/system/etc/cpuinfo.spoofed /proc/cpuinfo` which sets MS_BIND.

magisk-mount-unbind-and-namespace (umount/umount2/move_mount/open_tree/fsopen/fsconfig/fsmount/fspick/mount_setattr — required by Magisk's late_start_service to manage bind-mount lifecycle inside its mnt namespace; pivot_root, swapon, swapoff intentionally NOT included)
namespace-create (Android zygote + Magisk magiskhide; setns intentionally NOT here — namespace re-entry would let escaped uid attach to host PID namespace)

ptrace-TRACEME-only (request==PTRACE_TRACEME==0). PTRACE_ATTACH (16), PTRACE_PEEK* (1/2/3), PTRACE_POKE* (4/5/6) all return EPERM via defaultAction because this arg-filtered allow does not cover them. magiskhide's tracer-pid scrub on hidden processes WILL fail; L4 Shamiko (L0b-level Zygisk hide) is the intended root-hiding mechanism and does not require host-side ptrace.
perf-and-bpf (Android Profiler + RenderScript dispatch). bpf is allowed but kernel BPF JIT must be off on host.

explicit-deny-documentation (these are denied because defaultAction=SCMP_ACT_ERRNO and they appear in NO allow group above; listed here for auditor traceability only). Forbidden syscalls: process_vm_readv, process_vm_writev, init_module, finit_module, delete_module, create_module, query_module, kexec_load, kexec_file_load, reboot, iopl, ioperm, acct, quotactl, lookup_dcookie, nfsservctl, personality, vhangup, pivot_root, swapon, swapoff, uselib, ustat, sysfs, setdomainname, sethostname, setns.
